languages.text: La cible doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g}. En cas d'échec, elle subit l'effet {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}Entrave mentale{/g}. Une seule créature à la fois peut subir cet effet.{g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}{/g}

languages.text: Hedef, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}zihin prangalı{/g} hâle gelir. Aynı anda yalnızca bir düşman {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}zihin prangalılaştırılabilir{/g}.

Only one creature at a time can be {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}mindshackled{/g}.

languages.text: 目标必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，若检定失败，则陷入{g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}精神枷锁{/g}状态。同一时间只能有一个生物处于{g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}精神枷锁{/g}状态。

Only one creature at a time can be {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}mindshackled{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 目标必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，若检定失败，则陷入{g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}精神枷锁{/g}状态。同一时间只能有一个生物处于{g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}精神枷锁{/g}状态。

languages.text: El objetivo debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g} o sufrir {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}cepo mental{/g}. No puede haber más de una criatura con {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}cepo mental{/g} al mismo tiempo.

languages.text: Das Ziel muss eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g} bestehen, um nicht mit {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}Verstandesketten{/g} belegt zu werden. Es kann immer nur eine Kreatur mit {g|f:5d6b0349dc304a8995f00547108fdcf8}Verstandesketten{/g} belegt werden.
